purpose: Define how publicly accessible current-time market sources may be used when freezing a user-requested pre-match snapshot. Source visibility alone never satisfies the CURRENT synchronization gate.

conditions: use one explicitly identified bookmaker/provider across 1X2, AH and OU where possible
capture each surface within the V5.2.3 five-minute synchronization window
persist the exact extracted provider prices and canonical SHA-256 snapshot
do not count aggregator copies as independent bookmakers
do not use a post-match historical page without original/observed pre-kickoff evidence as formal PIT

promotion_to_primary_requires: complete 1X2 + two-sided AH + two-sided OU extraction
auditable observation timestamps within five minutes
no authentication bypass, CAPTCHA bypass or access-control circumvention

asianodds_public.reason: No complete synchronized 1X2 surface; cannot alone satisfy V5.2.3 or CURRENT market snapshot completeness.

source_preference_order: same-provider complete current 1X2+AH+OU with auditable observation time
OddsPortal bookmaker-specific complete same-window surface if normally accessible
Sofascore public JSON only after its OU/timestamp route is verified
AsianOdds as AH/OU movement crosscheck only
hard_stop: If a complete same-window current 1X2+AH+OU snapshot cannot be established, market module must downgrade. Never synthesize missing prices/lines and never calculate formal market EV from incomplete price surfaces.
